summary: CRITICAL: Missing required files (package.json, bun.lockb, fixtures/artifacts.json, cleanup.test.ts) — workflow will fail on `bun install` and file-not-found. No act infrastructure: task requires multiple test cases, act-result.txt generation, and output verification; workflow is single hardcoded run. cleanup.ts has decent types/error handling but maxTotalBytes policy (lines 50–60) interacts ambiguously with other policies (survivors already filtered may leave no candidates). Workflow references nonexistent fixture without providing it; input flag `dry-run` accepted but unused in steps. TDD methodology not demonstrated (no test file shown). Actionlint not validated.
